title: aegopodium tenerum
intro: Aegopodium tenerum, also known as dwarf giant or small goutweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Aegopodium tenerum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and gout. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
